syllogism_text: Any and all clouds are made of solid iron. There are clouds that are a type of cumulus. This implies that some cumulus clouds are solid iron.

attempts.code:
% Facts
cloud(c1).
cumulus(c1).

% Rule from first premise: All clouds are made of solid iron
solid_iron(X) :- cloud(X).

% Validity check: Some cumulus clouds are solid iron
valid_syllogism :- cumulus(X), solid_iron(X).
